title: diphyes polyblepharos
intro_study: According to "Zhongguo Zhong yao za zhi = Zhongguo zhongyao zazhi = China journal of Chinese materia medica", diphyes polyblepharos, which is also known as Paris polyphylla, has been found to have benefits in treating cancer and diseases related to the respiratory, digestive, and genitourinary systems, due to its 19 active steroidal saponin components.
side_effects: Diphyes polyblepharos can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing, as well as gastrointestinal issues like nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Prolonged use or excessive consumption of the plant can lead to more serious complications, including liver damage and kidney strain. In rare cases, Diphyes polyblepharos can also cause cardiovascular problems, such as irregular heartbeat and blood pressure fluctuations. If not used under the guidance of a medical professional, individuals may experience an increased risk of these side effects, highlighting the importance of proper handling and use.
